diagram_title: Dialog Continuation Identity Change — C4 Component Diagram

systems.name: OpenCode Runtime
systems.description: Session/runtime system coordinating provider-backed dialog continuation.

systems.name: Provider Responses API
systems.description: Remote provider API that owns provider-issued continuity handles.

containers.name: Session Runtime
containers.description: Session orchestration, replay, compaction, checkpoint handling.

containers.name: Provider Adapter
containers.description: Provider-specific serializer, streaming adapter, and sticky state surfaces.

components.name: Identity Boundary Gate
components.description: Detects provider/account/model identity changes before continuation replay.

components.name: Checkpoint Warm Start Builder
components.description: Builds safe semantic context from checkpoint/summary for the new identity.

components.name: Responses Replay Serializer
components.description: Transforms local replay parts into OpenAI/Codex-style Responses payloads.

components.name: Provider Continuity Cleanup Hook
components.description: Drops provider-specific remote refs and sticky turn state when identity changes.

components.name: Responses Stream Adapter
components.description: Consumes remote stream events and stores provider-issued item ids as local metadata.

relationships.description: identity change triggers provider-specific continuity cleanup
identity gate selects safe warm-start source
safe local context is serialized into next payload
dispatch next request without stale remote refs
remote response emits fresh continuity ids
stored metadata participates in future identity checks
